Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Eugan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Eugan is a perceptive raven bonded to Feiora.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Eugan rests on Feiora's padded shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Eugan is someone Leah tells Feiora to keep absolutely safe.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 13''' — Eugan is a raven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Eugan is associated with a Corvinus tribe lodge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Eugan is a guide for Leah in Avernus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Eugan is a raven that accompanies Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 18''' — Eugan was asked by the Avernus Incarnation to bring Leah to Avernus.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
